ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "location_found" TEXT /* Location where the animal was found */,
  "intake_type" TEXT /* Type of intake (e.g., Stray, Owner Surrender) */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the animal */,
  "animal_type" TEXT /* Type of animal (e.g., Dog, Cat) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the animal */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal */,
  "sterilized" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is sterilized */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the animal */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "intake_date" TEXT /* Date the animal was taken into the shelter */,
  "intake_time" TEXT /* Time the animal was taken into the shelter */,
  "meridian" TEXT /* Meridian of the intake time (AM/PM) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of intake */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week of intake */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the animal's stay (e.g., Adoption, Return to Owner) */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Details of the outcome */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "microchipped" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is microchipped */,
  "color_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the animal's color */,
  "breed_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the animal's breed */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the animal */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has special needs */,
  "behavioral_notes" TEXT /* Behavioral notes for the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption event */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal being adopted */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of the adoption */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the adoption process (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "adoption_fee" TEXT /* Adoption fee paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_adopter_id FOREIGN KEY ("adopter_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adopters" (
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adopter */,
  "adopter_name" TEXT /* Name of the adopter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the adopter */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the adoption application (e.g., Submitted, Approved) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the adoption application was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "medical_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal */,
  "medical_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical procedure */,
  "medical_procedure" TEXT /* Type of medical procedure */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the medical procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory item (e.g., Food, Medical Supplies) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption application */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the adoption application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the adoption application (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_intakes" (
  "intake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intake */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal */,
  "intake_date" TEXT /* Date the animal was taken into the shelter */,
  "intake_time" TEXT /* Time the animal was taken into the shelter */,
  "intake_type" TEXT /* Type of intake (e.g., Stray, Owner Surrender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Adoption, Return to Owner) */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Details of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
column_names: Location where the animal was found
